column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Manatee County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
When will it stop in Zephyhills, this is awful , the wind and rain unbelievable, feels like hours and hours 🙏
sorry mom it’s never ending! I hope you’re ok.
I’m safe Thankyou honey , what a ride scary , and still going
Right before the last one issued Tim & I heard all kinds of howling in the wind. I agree. Come on daytime.
going to be a long night
When will this be over for Pinellas?
the tornado watch that includes Pinellas is effective until 6AM.
so is this for the st Pete folks?
no, this tornado warning was for manatee county.
That not near us and it's moving north.
doing ok, thankful you all left before all this messy weather. Been raining like no end all day. Thanks, Nicole.🙏🥰
we are safe love thank you 😊💯❤️
